description: Security validation and pre-commit test reminders for buddy-evolver

hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Before committing changes to BuddyPatcher Swift code, run swift test in scripts/BuddyPatcher/ to verify all tests pass. If tests have not been run yet this session, run them now before proceeding with the commit."}'; fi
